title: Macaw's TerraformersMC
description: This mod is a multi-compatibility for the mods developed by the TerraformersMC. Like Traverse / Cinderscapes or Terrestria.
body:
This mod is a multi-compatibility for Macaw's Bridges/Fences/Roofs/Furnitures/Stairs/Paths/Trapdoors/Doors/Windows and the mods created by TerraformersMC. 

Whether it is Traverse / Cinderscapes or Terrestria.

The mod will automatically add bridges/roofs or fences with materials from other mods.

This mod is a unoficial addons of macaw's mods, if mod will be crash and bug please report in this [issue](https://github.com/Samlegamer/Macaw-s-Addons/issues).

This mod supported :  

Traverse
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5uSvd1Ca/images/abc749de094a0d09688429c007dda1ce220fea6e.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5uSvd1Ca/images/abc749de094a0d09688429c007dda1ce220fea6e.png)

Cinderscapes
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5uSvd1Ca/images/2304a3d7dc5f711ee17c865b187fbe53a5358b69.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5uSvd1Ca/images/2304a3d7dc5f711ee17c865b187fbe53a5358b69.png)

Terrestria
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5uSvd1Ca/images/8eb417e7ff19f39fae3693aa28116dfeacc728da.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5uSvd1Ca/images/8eb417e7ff19f39fae3693aa28116dfeacc728da.png)

**Required Depedency:**

[AddonsLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/addonslib)

**Optional Dependency:**

[Macaw's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/sketchmacaw)

Traverse ([FORGE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/traverse-reforged) / [FABRIC](https://modrinth.com/mod/traverse))

Cinderscapes ([FORGE](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes-reforged) / [FABRIC](https://modrinth.com/mod/cinderscapes))

Terrestria ([FORGE](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria-reforged) / [FABRIC](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrestria))
